series_metadata.series_description: Assessments made on Highway Use Tax Permit-Holders and lessees for outstanding Highway Use Tax and Motor Fuel Use Tax due based on recommendation of field audit or office audit of return(s).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 4 years after the end of the calendar year in which payment is received. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years after the end of the calendar year in which payment is received., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
